item.title: One more reason to NOT shop at Walgreens
item.description: “I said, ‘You won’t refill it, or you can’t refill it?’” Martin said. Martin called her doctor, who told her she had four refills on the prescription. The doctor’s office called Walgreens. Then Martin received two more texts, one saying the medicine was delayed and another alleging it was “out of stock.” These people should fired! What would they do if someone refused to sell them their medication?
item.dc:creator: Betterbecauseofthem

item.title: DON'T. BLINK. [An Owl House comic by MoringMark]
item.description:
Artist source: https://moringmark.tumblr.com https://www.reddit.com/user/makmark
Amity: "Wait, did you die?!" Luz: "Sadly, yes. BUT I LIVED!!!"
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: I just got my high school diploma in Tunisia! Ngl, it looks really pretty as well. :) Now, I cannot wait to go to the art academy in Italy. I. AM. READY! BRING IT ON, WORLD!
item.description: If you would like to support me as a 19-year-old self-taught artist, I got 2 links in my bio on here. Patreon for monthly donation and paypal for a one-time donation. Both help a lot. Thank you all. A lot of you donate and it means the world to me. (づ￣ ³￣)づ
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi

item.title: No one has to love math...
item.description: ... but for fuck sake, everyone has an unhealthy hatred/ fear of it. Math is your fucking right. You have the right to understand the fucking world around you, to stare into the fucking face of god. Math is beautiful and holy and the education systems is punching kids into the fucking ground with shitty pedagogy and rigid gatekeeping.
item.dc:creator: ifyouyellicry

item.title: FINALLY!!!!!
item.description: I have never cried so hard from joy. I’m post knee reconstruction with ACL/MCL/PCL allograft after a knee dislocation. Surgery was on March 30 but I’ve stalled out at 80ish degrees with physical therapy (plus home exercise daily) twice a week. This morning, I had a manipulation under anesthesia with a lysis of adhesions and BOOM!!! Got to 127 degrees in the OR and this is my second heel slide at home. Doesn’t look like much but I haven’t gotten this far since January AND I got a full rotation on the bike. Now on to PT at 1600! TL/DR:Op cries because she can bend her knee.
item.dc:creator: CostcoHotDongs

.
:
.
.
.
This is not really a meme. But you can probably figure it out.
.
.
.
You can never have too many P&P adaptations. I’m a fan of the Bollywood version “Bride and Prejudice.”
.
.
.
Part of my job is cleaning public showers. These images hit very close to home.
May we all have the self esteem of this pigeon
.
.
.
.
.
